schemas.definition: z.object({ templates: z.array(z.object({ templateId: z.string(), name: z.string(), subject: z.string(), triggerEvent: z.string().nullable(), isDefault: z.boolean(), updatedAt: z.string().datetime() })) })

z.object({ templateId: z.string(), name: z.string(), subject: z.string(), body: z.string(), availableVariables: z.array(z.string()), isDefault: z.boolean(), createdAt: z.string().datetime(), updatedAt: z.string().datetime() })
z.object({ name: z.string().min(1), subject: z.string().min(1), body: z.string().min(1) })

z.object({ automations: z.array(z.object({ automationId: z.string(), triggerEvent: z.enum(['lead_created','trial_scheduled','trial_approaching','enrollment_completed','payment_overdue','class_start_approaching']), templateId: z.string(), templateName: z.string(), delayMinutes: z.number().nullable(), enabled: z.boolean(), updatedAt: z.string().datetime() })) })

z.object({ triggerEvent: z.enum(['lead_created','trial_scheduled','trial_approaching','enrollment_completed','payment_overdue','class_start_approaching']), templateId: z.string(), delayMinutes: z.number().int().min(0).optional(), enabled: z.boolean() })

z.object({ automationId: z.string(), triggerEvent: z.string(), templateId: z.string(), templateName: z.string(), delayMinutes: z.number().nullable(), enabled: z.boolean(), updatedAt: z.string().datetime() })

z.object({ deliveryStatus: z.enum(['sent','failed','pending']).optional(), triggerEvent: z.string().optional(), search: z.string().optional(), page: z.number().int().min(1).default(1), limit: z.number().int().min(1).max(100).default(25) })

z.object({ communications: z.array(z.object({ logId: z.string(), recipientEmail: z.string(), recipientName: z.string(), subject: z.string(), templateName: z.string(), triggerEvent: z.string(), deliveryStatus: z.enum(['sent','failed','pending']), sentAt: z.string().datetime().nullable(), failureReason: z.string().nullable() })), total: z.number(), page: z.number(), limit: z.number() })
z.object({ logId: z.string(), message: z.string(), retryQueued: z.boolean() })
